steps.title: Interpret the intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept is the value of $f(x)$ when $x=0$. Here, $x$ represents the number of bracelets Maya has made, so $x=0$ means the starting amount before any bracelets are made.

steps.title: Evaluate the starting amount
steps.content: Substitute $0$ into the function:$$f(0)=-7(0)+49=49$$So the intercept represents about $49$ feet of yarn at the start, not the rate used for each bracelet. The answer is C.
